method.rule: Screen on all observed submissions; never treat the current leaderboard representative as the full HU history.
limitations: AWS submission-level history ends Jul 3; later history is recovered from dated public snapshots and current public data.
A platform bestRank is historical evidence but not a stored historical score or rank snapshot.
Missing content and timing samples are neutral, not treated as perfect.
